text: Unified Pension Scheme (UPS): Guaranteed pension for government employees. Benefits: 50% of the average basic pay drawn over the last 12 months prior to retirement.
NPS Vatsalya: A pension scheme for minors where parents can save for their child's retirement. Benefits: Long-term compounding and seamless transition to a regular NPS account at age 18.
PM E-Drive Scheme: Subsidies for electric vehicle buyers. Benefits: Direct financial incentives for purchasing e-2W, e-3W, and e-buses to promote green mobility.
PM Viksit Bharat Rozgar Yojana: Incentivizing employment generation. Benefits: Reimbursement of employer contributions to EPF for new employees in formal sectors.

National Overseas Scholarship Scheme: Financial assistance for students from marginalized communities to study abroad. Benefits: Tuition fees, maintenance allowance, and travel expenses for Master's and PhD programs.
SHREYAS Scheme: Scheme for Higher Education Youth in Apprenticeship and Skills. Benefits: Industry apprenticeship opportunities and stipend for non-technical graduates.
HRIDAY Scheme: Heritage City Development and Augmentation Yojana. Benefits: Conserving heritage assets and developing core infrastructure in heritage cities like Varanasi and Puri.
PM PRANAM: Promotion of Alternate Nutrients for Agriculture Management. Benefits: Incentivizing states to reduce the use of chemical fertilizers and adopt sustainable nutrients.
National Common Mobility Card (NCMC): One card for all transport payments. Benefits: Seamless payment across metro, buses, and railways using a single Rupay-based card.
Sansad Adarsh Gram Yojana: Developing model villages under the mentorship of MPs. Benefits: Integrated development of villages focusing on education, health, and livelihoods.
PM-FME: Prime Minister Formalisation of Micro food processing Enterprises. Benefits: Financial, technical, and business support for the up-gradation of micro food processing units.
National Beekeeping & Honey Mission: Promotion of scientific beekeeping. Benefits: Subsidies for bee boxes, equipment, and honey processing units to increase income.
Aatmanirbhar Bharat Rojgar Yojana: Incentives for creating new employment opportunities. Benefits: Government pays the EPF contribution for new employees in registered establishments.
PM SVANidhi: Interest subsidy on working capital loans for street vendors. Benefits: 7% interest subsidy on timely repayment and digital transaction incentives.
Stand Up India: Credit guarantee for loans to SC/ST and women. Benefits: Loans from 10 lakh to 1 crore for setting up greenfield enterprises.
PM Mudra Yojana: Credit support for micro-enterprises. Benefits: Collateral-free loans up to 10 lakh for small business activities.
